name: Initial Response
template:
Hi {{issueReporter}},

Thanks for reaching out. I am reviewing this request and will follow up here when I have more information.

[insert signature]

name: Investigating
template:
Hi {{issueReporter}},

I am still investigating this issue. I will update this ticket as soon as I have a confirmed next step or resolution.

[insert signature]

name: Need More Information
template:
Hi {{issueReporter}},

Could you please provide a little more detail so I can continue troubleshooting?

Helpful details include the steps you took, what you expected to happen, what happened instead, and any screenshots or examples related to this request.

[insert signature]

name: Resolved
template:
Hi {{issueReporter}},

This should now be resolved. Please review when you have a chance and let us know if you still see the issue.

[insert signature]

name: Closing
template:
Hi {{issueReporter}},

I am closing this request for now. If you need anything else or the issue comes back, please reply here and we can reopen or continue from this ticket.

[insert signature]
